plan.failureSummary: The AI-driven step failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is no longer present in the UI. Visual evidence shows the field has been replaced or renamed to 'Your Name'.
observedIndicators: UI discrepancy: Cached selector for 'Last Name' failed, but screenshot shows 'Your Name' field.
flexible semantic intent: 'Fill out the all of the survey questions'

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the Donobu AI cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: The clearPageAiCache directive is set. Re-running the test will force the AI to re-scan the page and adapt to the current UI structure.

remediationSteps.summary: Verify UI changes with the product team.
remediationSteps.details: If 'Last Name' was expected as a separate field for business logic reasons, verify if the application change was intentional. If 'Your Name' is the new standard, no further code change is needed as the AI will adapt once the cache is cleared.

plan.notes: The massive duration discrepancy between successful runs (~130s) and failures (~12s) in the history, combined with the 'DETERMINISTIC' run mode, confirms a stale cache issue. The UI has changed, making the cached selector for 'Last Name' (input-lastname) invalid. Since the overall objective is semantically flexible, clearing the cache will allow the AI to adapt to the new 'Your Name' field.
